zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Clermont於1030年9月5日出生在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特時，他的父親Renaud de Clermont de Creil I20歲，母親Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais21歲。他和Marguerite Roucy至少有3個兒子和5個女兒。他於1070年登記服兵役。他去世於1101年6月9日在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh de Clermont于1030年9月5日出生在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特时，他的父亲Renaud de Clermont de Creil I20岁，母亲Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais21岁。他和Marguerite Roucy至少有3个儿子和5个女儿。他于1070年登记服兵役。他去世于1101年6月9日在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪奧易可勒爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clermont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Georges, Normand, Pierre, Armand, Edouard, Gaston, Ghislaine, Gilles, Henri, Herve, Jean Francois.

French and English (Middlesex, of Norman and French Huguenot origin): habitational name from any of various places in France called (Le) Clermont, from Old French clair, cler ‘bright, clear’ + mont ‘hill’, i.e. a hill that could be seen a long way off. Compare Clairmont .

English (Middlesex, of Norman and possibly also Huguenot origin): variant of Claremont, from the Old French female personal name Claremonde, supposedly from ancient Germanic Claremunda, a hybrid compound of Latin clarus ‘famous’ + ancient Germanic mund ‘protection’.

variants.name: Clairmont
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Adelard, Aime, Antoine, Aurore, Fernand.
French: variant of Clermont and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Clairmont is very rare in France.
In some cases possibly also English: variant of Claremont or Clermont . This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Clermont was born on 5 September 1030, in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, his father, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, was 20 and his mother, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 5 daughters with Marguerite Roucy. He registered for military service in 1070. He died on 9 June 1101, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Clermont est né le 5 septembre 1030, à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France, son père, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles avec Marguerite Roucy. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1070. Il est décédé le 9 juin 1101, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Clermont, Oise, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Clermont am 5. September 1030 in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Renaud de Clermont de Creil I 20 und seine Mutter Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais 21. Er hatte mit Marguerite Roucy mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1070 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 9. Juni 1101 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Clermont è nato il il 5 settembre 1030 nel Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie con Marguerite Roucy. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1070. Morì il 9 giugno 1101, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Clermontが1030年9月5日にフランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントで生まれた時，父Renaud de Clermont de Creil Iは20歳，母Ermengarde de clermont en beauvaisは21歳であった。彼はMarguerite Roucyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1070年に兵役登録をした。彼は1101年6月9日に故郷で70歳で死去し，フランスピカーディオイゼクラーモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Clermont(이)가 1030년 9월 5일 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Renaud de Clermont de Creil I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Marguerite Roucy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1070년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1101년 6월 9일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 이스 클레몽에 묻혔다.

mn.5 September 1030–9 June 1101: 1030 оны Есдүгээр сарын 5–1101 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 9

pt.5 September 1030–9 June 1101: 5 de setembro de 1030–9 de junho de 1101
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Clermont nasceu em 5 de setembro de 1030, em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França, seu pai, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas com Marguerite Roucy. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1070. Ele faleceu em 9 de junho de 1101, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Clermont, Oise, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Clermont родился 5 сентября 1030 г. в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Renaud de Clermont de Creil I было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей от Marguerite Roucy. В 1070 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 9 июня 1101 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности клирмонт, оис, пикарди, Франция.

es.5 September 1030–9 June 1101: 5 de septiembre de 1030–9 de junio de 1101
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Clermont nació el 5 de septiembre de 1030, en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Renaud de Clermont de Creil I, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Ermengarde de clermont en beauvais, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas con Marguerite Roucy. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1070. Murió el 9 de junio de 1101, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Clermont, Oise, Picardie, Francia.
